Crypto Data Analysis

Real-time cryptocurrency analytics using the Coinbase API with Python, Pandas, and Matplotlib.

Fetched real-time cryptocurrency data via the Coinbase API and performed exploratory analysis in Python—using Pandas for manipulation and Matplotlib for trend and pattern visualizations across the crypto market.
